title: Grace Craft
description: This mod adds entities from the roblox game "Grace" to the minecraft.
body:
# HEAVY W.I.P This mod adds entities from the roblox game "Grace" to the minecraft. The game is really good here's a link Assets are owned by Grace creators! Not all, but mostly. To spawn entities run /spawnentity [entity name] [player name]
You can also enable random entity spawn by going into the mod's config
You can use it to troll your friends, idk.
